Name: AddressType
Title: AddressType
Description: The type of an address (physical / postal).

Name: AdministrativeGender
Title: AdministrativeGender
Description: The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.

Name: CountryValueSet
Title: Country ValueSet
Description: This value set defines a base set of codes for countries.             Note: The codes for countries are taken from    [ISO 3166](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html).

Name: Identifier Type Codes
Title: IdentifierType
Description: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

Name: IdentifierUse
Title: IdentifierUse
Description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: LinkType
Title: LinkType
Description: The type of link between this patient resource and another patient resource.

Name: PatientContactRelationship
Title: Patient Contact Relationship
Description: The nature of the relationship between the patient and the contact person.

Name: ZimProvinceVS
Title: Zimbabwe Province Value Set
Description: Subset of ISO 3166-2 codes representing Zimbabwe provinces
